hooks.command: CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '^gh pr create' && ! echo "$CMD" | grep -q '\-\-repo jss367/Airlock'; then echo '{"decision": "block", "reason": "BLOCKED: All PRs MUST use --repo jss367/Airlock."}'; fi

OUTPUT=$(jq -r '.tool_output.stdout // .tool_output.content // empty' 2>/dev/null); PR_URL=$(echo "$OUTPUT" | grep -oE 'https://github.com/[^/]+/[^/]+/pull/[0-9]+' | head -1); if [ -n "$PR_URL" ]; then SCRIPT_DIR=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)/scripts/check-pr.sh; (sleep 900 && "$SCRIPT_DIR" "$PR_URL") & disown; fi
